notes: Adds app-wide volume controls and a VHS-style volume overlay across the player.
Adds audio-reactive Tape Deck VU bars driven by the currently playing track.
Adds The Tube transcoding controls so Tater Tube Server can choose CRT, 1080p, or 4K output per player.
Moves The Tube setup to the top of Web Setup and keeps server pairing, quality, and TV Mode settings together.
